name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services through physical retail locations across multiple states.
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates as a multi-service financial company with a network of physical store locations, offering emergency cash solutions and related financial services. The company has been established long enough to have a substantial footprint, with locations across multiple states including Colorado and Louisiana, though the website evidence suggests some locations may be temporarily affected by external events (Hurricane Ida closure mentioned for New Orleans stores). ACE's core service offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services. The company also operates an online lending platform for customers seeking remote access to loans. Their products are positioned as quick-access financial solutions for consumers facing immediate cash needs, with offerings ranging from same-day or next-day funding services. The company maintains customer service infrastructure via phone and email for both general inquiries and online loan operations, suggesting a dual retail-and-digital approach. A notable limitation is state-by-state availability—the website content indicates certain loan products are not available in all states (specifically a message stating "Sorry, this type of loan is not available in this state" appears in their interface). This regulatory variation is common in lending but affects service accessibility. The company's emphasis on multiple service types (beyond just payday loans) distinguishes it from single-product lenders. However, the specific APR rates, loan terms, eligibility requirements, and detailed fee structures are not available from the provided website excerpts, making cost comparison difficult. The emergency-cash category is appropriate given their focus on title loans and installment loans marketed as quick funding solutions, though the breadth of services (tax preparation, money transfers, business services) suggests a broader financial services model.
address: 5600 NE Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Portland, OR 97211

company_info.headquarters: 5600 NE Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Portland, OR 97211

pros: Multiple service offerings beyond loans including check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services in one location
Online lending platform available for remote loan applications alongside physical store network
Established multi-state operation with numerous store locations for customer access
Same-day or next-day funding available on certain loan products
Title loans offered as collateral-based option for customers with vehicle equity
Business services available, indicating flexibility beyond consumer-only products
Toll-free customer service lines dedicated to both general inquiries and online loans
cons: Specific loan products are not available in all states, limiting accessibility to some consumers
APR rates, loan terms, and fee structures not transparent in available website content
Physical store dependency for certain services limits convenience for remote customers
Website contains broken links and 404 errors, making information difficult to access
No visible information about credit requirements or eligibility criteria for loans
best_for: Consumers with vehicle equity seeking title loans for quick cash access
Multi-service customers needing check cashing, bill payments, and loans from one provider
People in service-coverage states who prefer in-person financial transactions
Individuals seeking same-day or next-day cash solutions for emergencies
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in states where their products are available who need quick emergency cash and prefer multi-service financial locations. The primary caveat is that service and product availability varies significantly by state, and detailed cost information (APR, fees) is not readily accessible from their website, requiring direct contact for pricing transparency.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
